title: Cheesy Pasta Bake
description: A simple yet satisfying pasta dish loaded with cheese and baked to perfection. This Argentine-inspired recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Add paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in shredded cheese until melted and smooth.
Combine cooked pasta and cheese mixture in a large bowl.
Transfer pasta to a baking dish and top with additional cheese if desired.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
